nasb.text: And you have seen all that the Lord your God has done to all these nations because of you, for the Lord your God is He who has been fighting for you.

esv.text: And you have seen all that the Lord your God has done to all these nations for your sake, for it is the Lord your God who has fought for you.

cnv.text: 耶和華你們的　神，因你們的緣故，向那些國家所行的一切事，你們都親眼看見了；因為耶和華你們的　神為你們作戰。

ccb.text: 你们都亲眼看见你们的上帝耶和华怎样为了你们而对付列邦，亲自为你们争战。
